message:
feat: Phase 1 - Iron Kernel complete

Initial implementation of Zell LLM inference engine with:
- Zig wrapper for llama.cpp C API (src/llama.zig)
- CLI with run, info, version, help commands (src/main.zig)
- build.zig compiling llama.cpp sources directly
- Metal GPU acceleration on macOS
- ARM-specific quantization support

The binary loads GGUF models and runs inference without
external shared libraries - a single static Zig binary.

files.patch:

+
+[*.{c,cpp,h,hpp,m}]
+indent_style = space
+indent_size = 4
+

+trim_trailing_whitespace = false
+
+[Makefile]

@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+# Zell
+
+LLM inference engine built with Zig + llama.cpp.
+
+## Features
+
+- **Fast startup**: KV cache snapshots for instant resume (planned)
+- **Embeddable**: Library API, not just a server
+- **Single binary**: Static Zig binary, no runtime dependencies
+- **Metal/CUDA**: GPU acceleration via llama.cpp backends
+
+## Building
+
+Requires Zig 0.13.0+
+
+```bash
+# Clone with submodules
+git clone --recursive https://github.com/teamchong/zell
+cd zell
+
+# Build
+zig build -Doptimize=ReleaseFast
+
+# Run
+./zig-out/bin/zell run ./model.gguf "Hello, world"
+```
+
+## Usage
+
+```bash
+# Run inference
+zell run <model.gguf> <prompt>
+
+# Show model info
+zell info <model.gguf>
+
+# Version
+zell version
+```
+
+## Architecture
+
+```
+zell/
+├── build.zig        # Build configuration
+├── src/
+│   ├── main.zig     # CLI entry point
+│   └── llama.zig    # Zig wrapper for llama.cpp C API
+└── vendor/
+    └── llama.cpp/   # llama.cpp submodule
+```
+
+## Roadmap
+
+- [x] Basic inference (load model, generate text)
+- [ ] KV cache snapshots (Wizer-style instant resume)
+- [ ] Library API with C header
+- [ ] lanceql integration (LoRA selection, RAG)
+- [ ] edgebox integration (tool execution)
+- [ ] Continuous batching (multiple concurrent requests)
+
+## Part of the Stack
+
+Zell is the inference engine component of a larger AI runtime:
+
+- **[metal0](https://github.com/teamchong/metal0)**: Python → native compiler
+- **[edgebox](https://github.com/teamchong/edgebox)**: WASM sandbox for code execution
+- **[lanceql](https://github.com/teamchong/lanceql)**: Vector search and data queries
+- **zell**: LLM inference engine (this repo)
+
+## License
+
+MIT

@@ -0,0 +1,428 @@
+const std = @import("std");
+
+pub fn build(b: *std.Build) void {
+    const target = b.standardTargetOptions(.{});
+    const optimize = b.standardOptimizeOption(.{});
+
+    // llama.cpp source directory
+    const llama_dir = "vendor/llama.cpp";
+
+    // Initialize submodule if needed
+    const init_submodule = b.addSystemCommand(&.{
+        "sh", "-c",
+        "test -f vendor/llama.cpp/src/llama.cpp || git submodule update --init --recursive",
+    });
+    init_submodule.setName("init-llama-submodule");
+
+    // ===================
+    // llama.cpp C/C++ sources
+    // ===================
+
+    // Core llama.cpp source files (src/)
+    const llama_cpp_files = &[_][]const u8{
+        "src/llama.cpp",
+        "src/llama-adapter.cpp",
+        "src/llama-arch.cpp",
+        "src/llama-batch.cpp",
+        "src/llama-chat.cpp",
+        "src/llama-context.cpp",
+        "src/llama-cparams.cpp",
+        "src/llama-grammar.cpp",
+        "src/llama-graph.cpp",
+        "src/llama-hparams.cpp",
+        "src/llama-impl.cpp",
+        "src/llama-io.cpp",
+        "src/llama-kv-cache.cpp",
+        "src/llama-kv-cache-iswa.cpp",
+        "src/llama-memory.cpp",
+        "src/llama-memory-hybrid.cpp",
+        "src/llama-memory-recurrent.cpp",
+        "src/llama-mmap.cpp",
+        "src/llama-model.cpp",
+        "src/llama-model-loader.cpp",
+        "src/llama-model-saver.cpp",
+        "src/llama-quant.cpp",
+        "src/llama-sampling.cpp",
+        "src/llama-vocab.cpp",
+        "src/unicode.cpp",
+        "src/unicode-data.cpp",
+        // Model-specific implementations (src/models/)
+        "src/models/afmoe.cpp",
+        "src/models/apertus.cpp",
+        "src/models/arcee.cpp",
+        "src/models/arctic.cpp",
+        "src/models/arwkv7.cpp",
+        "src/models/baichuan.cpp",
+        "src/models/bailingmoe.cpp",
+        "src/models/bailingmoe2.cpp",
+        "src/models/bert.cpp",
+        "src/models/bitnet.cpp",
+        "src/models/bloom.cpp",
+        "src/models/chameleon.cpp",
+        "src/models/chatglm.cpp",
+        "src/models/codeshell.cpp",
+        "src/models/cogvlm.cpp",
+        "src/models/cohere2-iswa.cpp",
+        "src/models/command-r.cpp",
+        "src/models/dbrx.cpp",
+        "src/models/deci.cpp",
+        "src/models/deepseek.cpp",
+        "src/models/deepseek2.cpp",
+        "src/models/dots1.cpp",
+        "src/models/dream.cpp",
+        "src/models/ernie4-5-moe.cpp",
+        "src/models/ernie4-5.cpp",
+        "src/models/exaone.cpp",
+        "src/models/exaone4.cpp",
+        "src/models/falcon-h1.cpp",
+        "src/models/falcon.cpp",
+        "src/models/gemma-embedding.cpp",
+        "src/models/gemma.cpp",
+        "src/models/gemma2-iswa.cpp",
+        "src/models/gemma3.cpp",
+        "src/models/gemma3n-iswa.cpp",
+        "src/models/glm4-moe.cpp",
+        "src/models/glm4.cpp",
+        "src/models/gpt2.cpp",
+        "src/models/gptneox.cpp",
+        "src/models/granite-hybrid.cpp",
+        "src/models/granite.cpp",
+        "src/models/graph-context-mamba.cpp",
+        "src/models/grok.cpp",
+        "src/models/grovemoe.cpp",
+        "src/models/hunyuan-dense.cpp",
+        "src/models/hunyuan-moe.cpp",
+        "src/models/internlm2.cpp",
+        "src/models/jais.cpp",
+        "src/models/jamba.cpp",
+        "src/models/lfm2.cpp",
+        "src/models/llada-moe.cpp",
+        "src/models/llada.cpp",
+        "src/models/llama-iswa.cpp",
+        "src/models/llama.cpp",
+        "src/models/mamba.cpp",
+        "src/models/minicpm3.cpp",
+        "src/models/minimax-m2.cpp",
+        "src/models/mistral3.cpp",
+        "src/models/mpt.cpp",
+        "src/models/nemotron-h.cpp",
+        "src/models/nemotron.cpp",
+        "src/models/neo-bert.cpp",
+        "src/models/olmo.cpp",
+        "src/models/olmo2.cpp",
+        "src/models/olmoe.cpp",
+        "src/models/openai-moe-iswa.cpp",
+        "src/models/openelm.cpp",
+        "src/models/orion.cpp",
+        "src/models/pangu-embedded.cpp",
+        "src/models/phi2.cpp",
+        "src/models/phi3.cpp",
+        "src/models/plamo.cpp",
+        "src/models/plamo2.cpp",
+        "src/models/plm.cpp",
+        "src/models/qwen.cpp",
+        "src/models/qwen2.cpp",
+        "src/models/qwen2moe.cpp",
+        "src/models/qwen2vl.cpp",
+        "src/models/qwen3.cpp",
+        "src/models/qwen3moe.cpp",
+        "src/models/qwen3next.cpp",
+        "src/models/qwen3vl-moe.cpp",
+        "src/models/qwen3vl.cpp",
+        "src/models/refact.cpp",
+        "src/models/rnd1.cpp",
+        "src/models/rwkv6-base.cpp",
+        "src/models/rwkv6.cpp",
+        "src/models/rwkv6qwen2.cpp",
+        "src/models/rwkv7-base.cpp",
+        "src/models/rwkv7.cpp",
+        "src/models/seed-oss.cpp",
+        "src/models/smallthinker.cpp",
+        "src/models/smollm3.cpp",
+        "src/models/stablelm.cpp",
+        "src/models/starcoder.cpp",
+        "src/models/starcoder2.cpp",
+        "src/models/t5-dec.cpp",
+        "src/models/t5-enc.cpp",
+        "src/models/wavtokenizer-dec.cpp",
+        "src/models/xverse.cpp",
+    };
+
+    // GGML core source files (ggml/src/)
+    const ggml_core_c_files = &[_][]const u8{
+        "ggml/src/ggml.c",
+        "ggml/src/ggml-alloc.c",
+        "ggml/src/ggml-quants.c",
+    };
+
+    const ggml_core_cpp_files = &[_][]const u8{
+        "ggml/src/ggml.cpp",
+        "ggml/src/ggml-backend.cpp",
+        "ggml/src/ggml-backend-reg.cpp",
+        "ggml/src/ggml-opt.cpp",
+        "ggml/src/ggml-threading.cpp",
+        "ggml/src/gguf.cpp",
+    };
+
+    // GGML CPU backend source files (ggml/src/ggml-cpu/)
+    const ggml_cpu_c_files = &[_][]const u8{
+        "ggml/src/ggml-cpu/ggml-cpu.c",
+        "ggml/src/ggml-cpu/quants.c",
+    };
+
+    const ggml_cpu_cpp_files = &[_][]const u8{
+        "ggml/src/ggml-cpu/ggml-cpu.cpp",
+        "ggml/src/ggml-cpu/ops.cpp",
+        "ggml/src/ggml-cpu/vec.cpp",
+        "ggml/src/ggml-cpu/binary-ops.cpp",
+        "ggml/src/ggml-cpu/unary-ops.cpp",
+        "ggml/src/ggml-cpu/repack.cpp",
+        "ggml/src/ggml-cpu/hbm.cpp",
+        "ggml/src/ggml-cpu/traits.cpp",
+        "ggml/src/ggml-cpu/llamafile/sgemm.cpp",
+    };
+
+    // Architecture-specific implementations
+    const ggml_cpu_arch_arm_c_files = &[_][]const u8{
+        "ggml/src/ggml-cpu/arch/arm/quants.c",
+    };
+
+    const ggml_cpu_arch_arm_cpp_files = &[_][]const u8{
+        "ggml/src/ggml-cpu/arch/arm/repack.cpp",
+        "ggml/src/ggml-cpu/arch/arm/cpu-feats.cpp",
+    };
+
+    // macOS Metal support
+    const use_metal = target.result.os.tag == .macos;
+
+    // ===================
+    // Build zell executable
+    // ===================
+    const exe = b.addExecutable(.{
+        .name = "zell",
+        .root_module = b.createModule(.{
+            .root_source_file = b.path("src/main.zig"),
+            .target = target,
+            .optimize = optimize,
+        }),
+    });
+
+    exe.step.dependOn(&init_submodule.step);
+
+    // Include paths
+    exe.root_module.addIncludePath(b.path(llama_dir ++ "/include"));
+    exe.root_module.addIncludePath(b.path(llama_dir ++ "/ggml/include"));
+    exe.root_module.addIncludePath(b.path(llama_dir ++ "/ggml/src"));
+    exe.root_module.addIncludePath(b.path(llama_dir ++ "/ggml/src/ggml-cpu"));
+    exe.root_module.addIncludePath(b.path(llama_dir ++ "/src"));
+    exe.root_module.addIncludePath(b.path(llama_dir ++ "/common"));
+
+    // Common C flags
+    const common_c_flags = &[_][]const u8{
+        "-std=c11",
+        "-DNDEBUG",
+        "-DGGML_USE_CPU",
+        "-DGGML_VERSION=\"0.0.0\"",
+        "-DGGML_COMMIT=\"unknown\"",
+        "-fno-sanitize=undefined",
+        "-O3",
+    };
+
+    // Common C++ flags
+    const common_cpp_flags = &[_][]const u8{
+        "-std=c++17",
+        "-DNDEBUG",
+        "-DGGML_USE_CPU",
+        "-DGGML_VERSION=\"0.0.0\"",
+        "-DGGML_COMMIT=\"unknown\"",
+        "-fno-sanitize=undefined",
+        "-O3",
+    };
+
+    // Metal-specific flags
+    const metal_c_flags = &[_][]const u8{
+        "-std=c11",
+        "-DNDEBUG",
+        "-DGGML_USE_CPU",
+        "-DGGML_USE_METAL",
+        "-DGGML_VERSION=\"0.0.0\"",
+        "-DGGML_COMMIT=\"unknown\"",
+        "-fno-sanitize=undefined",
+        "-O3",
+    };
+
+    const metal_cpp_flags = &[_][]const u8{
+        "-std=c++17",
+        "-DNDEBUG",
+        "-DGGML_USE_CPU",
+        "-DGGML_USE_METAL",
+        "-DGGML_VERSION=\"0.0.0\"",
+        "-DGGML_COMMIT=\"unknown\"",
+        "-fno-sanitize=undefined",
+        "-O3",
+    };
+
+    const metal_objc_flags = &[_][]const u8{
+        "-DGGML_USE_METAL",
+        "-DGGML_VERSION=\"0.0.0\"",
+        "-DGGML_COMMIT=\"unknown\"",
+        "-fno-sanitize=undefined",
+        "-fno-objc-arc",
+        "-O3",
+    };
+
+    // Add sources based on Metal support
+    if (use_metal) {
+        // GGML core C files with Metal
+        exe.root_module.addCSourceFiles(.{
+            .root = b.path(llama_dir),
+            .files = ggml_core_c_files,
+            .flags = metal_c_flags,
+        });
+
+        // GGML core C++ files with Metal
+        exe.root_module.addCSourceFiles(.{
+            .root = b.path(llama_dir),
+            .files = ggml_core_cpp_files,
+            .flags = metal_cpp_flags,
+        });
+
+        // GGML CPU C files with Metal
+        exe.root_module.addCSourceFiles(.{
+            .root = b.path(llama_dir),
+            .files = ggml_cpu_c_files,
+            .flags = metal_c_flags,
+        });
+
+        // GGML CPU C++ files with Metal
+        exe.root_module.addCSourceFiles(.{
+            .root = b.path(llama_dir),
+            .files = ggml_cpu_cpp_files,
+            .flags = metal_cpp_flags,
+        });
+
+        // ARM-specific files (for macOS ARM)
+        exe.root_module.addCSourceFiles(.{
+            .root = b.path(llama_dir),
+            .files = ggml_cpu_arch_arm_c_files,
+            .flags = metal_c_flags,
+        });
+
+        exe.root_module.addCSourceFiles(.{
+            .root = b.path(llama_dir),
+            .files = ggml_cpu_arch_arm_cpp_files,
+            .flags = metal_cpp_flags,
+        });
+
+        // Llama C++ files with Metal
+        exe.root_module.addCSourceFiles(.{
+            .root = b.path(llama_dir),
+            .files = llama_cpp_files,
+            .flags = metal_cpp_flags,
+        });
+
+        // Metal backend files (Objective-C/C++)
+        exe.root_module.addCSourceFiles(.{
+            .root = b.path(llama_dir),
+            .files = &[_][]const u8{
+                "ggml/src/ggml-metal/ggml-metal-context.m",
+                "ggml/src/ggml-metal/ggml-metal-device.m",
+            },
+            .flags = metal_objc_flags,
+        });
+
+        exe.root_module.addCSourceFiles(.{
+            .root = b.path(llama_dir),
+            .files = &[_][]const u8{
+                "ggml/src/ggml-metal/ggml-metal.cpp",
+                "ggml/src/ggml-metal/ggml-metal-common.cpp",
+                "ggml/src/ggml-metal/ggml-metal-device.cpp",
+                "ggml/src/ggml-metal/ggml-metal-ops.cpp",
+            },
+            .flags = metal_cpp_flags,
+        });
+
+        // Metal include path
+        exe.root_module.addIncludePath(b.path(llama_dir ++ "/ggml/src/ggml-metal"));
+
+        // Metal frameworks
+        exe.root_module.linkFramework("Foundation", .{});
+        exe.root_module.linkFramework("Metal", .{});
+        exe.root_module.linkFramework("MetalKit", .{});
+        exe.root_module.linkFramework("Accelerate", .{});
+    } else {
+        // GGML core C files (no Metal)
+        exe.root_module.addCSourceFiles(.{
+            .root = b.path(llama_dir),
+            .files = ggml_core_c_files,
+            .flags = common_c_flags,
+        });
+
+        // GGML core C++ files (no Metal)
+        exe.root_module.addCSourceFiles(.{
+            .root = b.path(llama_dir),
+            .files = ggml_core_cpp_files,
+            .flags = common_cpp_flags,
+        });
+
+        // GGML CPU C files (no Metal)
+        exe.root_module.addCSourceFiles(.{
+            .root = b.path(llama_dir),
+            .files = ggml_cpu_c_files,
+            .flags = common_c_flags,
+        });
+
+        // GGML CPU C++ files (no Metal)
+        exe.root_module.addCSourceFiles(.{
+            .root = b.path(llama_dir),
+            .files = ggml_cpu_cpp_files,
+            .flags = common_cpp_flags,
+        });
+
+        // Llama C++ files (no Metal)
+        exe.root_module.addCSourceFiles(.{
+            .root = b.path(llama_dir),
+            .files = llama_cpp_files,
+            .flags = common_cpp_flags,
+        });
+    }
+
+    // Link system libraries
+    exe.linkLibC();
+    exe.linkLibCpp();
+
+    // Linux-specific
+    if (target.result.os.tag == .linux) {
+        exe.linkSystemLibrary("pthread");
+        exe.linkSystemLibrary("m");
+    }
+
+    b.installArtifact(exe);
+
+    // ===================
+    // Run command
+    // ===================
+    const run_cmd = b.addRunArtifact(exe);
+    run_cmd.step.dependOn(b.getInstallStep());
+    if (b.args) |args| {
+        run_cmd.addArgs(args);
+    }
+
+    const run_step = b.step("run", "Run zell");
+    run_step.dependOn(&run_cmd.step);
+
+    // ===================
+    // Test command
+    // ===================
+    const unit_tests = b.addTest(.{
+        .root_module = b.createModule(.{
+            .root_source_file = b.path("src/main.zig"),
+            .target = target,
+            .optimize = optimize,
+        }),
+    });
+
+    const run_unit_tests = b.addRunArtifact(unit_tests);
+    const test_step = b.step("test", "Run unit tests");
+    test_step.dependOn(&run_unit_tests.step);
+}
